HGSS.125.0000:
Whoa! You startled me there!\f
I had my BlackGlasses on, so I didn’t
notice you at all.\f
What am I doing here?\f
Hey, don’t you worry about it.
I’ll give you a pair of BlackGlasses, so\r
forget you saw me, OK?\f
HGSS.125.0002:
BlackGlasses up the power of
Dark-type moves.
HGSS.125.0003: You don’t have room for this...
